rationale: The one substantive ground-truth concern (dsocek's push to generalize the fix, e.g. drive it from _packed_modules_mapping, instead of hardcoding another component name) is echoed by X's comment #1 urging derivation from pipeline._dit_modules rather than a fourth hardcoded list, plus a grounded follow-on about text-encoder LoRA being a silent no-op — both concrete, file/line-anchored, and actionable. Y is a meticulous validation pass (many corroborated file:line facts, high precision) but raises zero design or follow-up concerns and lands on a bare APPROVE, missing the actual reviewer pushback and offering nothing actionable.
